description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/movements.json to reduce SKU-200's offending movement (index 1) from delta -8 to delta -5, so the running balance stays at 0 instead of going to -3. The remaining movements are unchanged and already keep every SKU's balance non-negative, so check_inventory.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_inventory.py: SKU-200 goes to -3 after movement index 1 (delta=-8) against an opening balance of 5. Reducing that movement's delta to -5 so the balance stays at 0 instead of going negative. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_inventory.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
